description: Style Note Pared down to the basic and updated with innovative style details, this fila Rockford shoe is a season closet essential. Add a refined twist to your casual wardrobe staples with this well-defined shoe. Product Details Round toed shoe with decorative stitch detail at the toe box and has central lace-ups Overlays at the midfoot and heel collar Well-padded tongue and inner Foamy rubber midsole Flat TPU outsole with grooves Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather parts Do not store in direct sunlight
